# PR #375 Acceptance Evidence

## Exact commands run

```bash
python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re,sys
roots=[Path('README.md'),Path('docs/ops/runbook')]
md_files=[]
for r in roots:
    if r.is_file(): md_files.append(r)
    else: md_files.extend(sorted(r.rglob('*.md')))
pat=re.compile(r'\[[^\]]+\]\(([^)]+)\)')
errors=[]
checked=0
for f in md_files:
    txt=f.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    for m in pat.finditer(txt):
        t=m.group(1).strip()
        if not t or t.startswith(('http://','https://','mailto:','#')):
            continue
        t=t.split('#',1)[0]
        if t.startswith('<') and t.endswith('>'): t=t[1:-1]
        p=(f.parent / t).resolve()
        checked+=1
        if not p.exists():
            errors.append(f"MISSING: {f} -> {t}")
print(f"checked_relative_links={checked}")
if errors:
    print("dead_link_audit=FAIL")
    for e in errors:
        print(e)
    sys.exit(1)
print("dead_link_audit=PASS")
PY
```
